mapper.sql:
SELECT A.ASMT_MTL_EVL_RSLT_ID , A.MTL_EVL_TYCD , A.MTL_EVL_TTL , A.DELYN , A.USEYN , A.ADM_REGYN , A.RGTR_ID , (SELECT USERNM FROM TB_LMS_USR WHERE USER_ID = A.RGTR_ID) AS RGTRNM , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.FRST_INQ_DTTM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') AS FRST_INQ_DTTM , (SELECT COUNT(T.QSTN_ID) FROM MTL_EVL_QSTN T WHERE T.ASMT_MTL_EVL_RSLT_ID = A.ASMT_MTL_EVL_RSLT_ID) AS EVAL_CNT FROM MTL_EVL A WHERE A.DELYN = 'N'
AND LOWER(A.MTL_EVL_TTL) LIKE FN_LIKE_VAL(LOWER(#{searchValue}))
mapper.select: SELECT RT.* , ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY RT.FRST_INQ_DTTM) AS LINE_NO , COUNT(RT.ASMT_MTL_EVL_RSLT_ID) OVER() AS TOTAL_CNT FROM ( ) RT ORDER BY RT.FRST_INQ_DTTM DESC
SELECT RT.* , ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY RT.FRST_INQ_DTTM) AS LINE_NO , COUNT(RT.ASMT_MTL_EVL_RSLT_ID) OVER() AS TOTAL_CNT FROM ( ) RT ORDER BY RT.FRST_INQ_DTTM DESC LIMIT #{firstIndex}, #{listScale}

SELECT A.ASMT_MTL_EVL_RSLT_ID , A.QSTN_ID , A.MTL_EVL_TYCD , A.UP_MTL_EVL_QSTN_ID , A.QSTN_SEQNO , A.QSTN_CTS , A.EVL_SCR , A.RGTR_ID , A.FRST_INQ_DTTM , A.MDFR_ID , A.MOD_DTTM FROM MTL_EVL_QSTN A WHERE A.ASMT_MTL_EVL_RSLT_ID = #{evalCd}

SELECT A.GRDCD , A.ASMT_MTL_EVL_RSLT_ID , A.QSTN_ID , A.MTL_EVL_GRD_TTL , A.MTL_EVL_GRD_CTS , A.MTL_EVL_MRK_GRDCD , A.RGTR_ID , A.FRST_INQ_DTTM , A.MDFR_ID , A.MOD_DTTM FROM MTL_EVL_GRD A WHERE A.QSTN_ID = #{qstnCd}

SELECT T.ASMT_MTL_EVL_RSLT_ID , T.MTL_EVL_TYCD , CONCAT('[기본] ', MTL_EVL_TTL) AS MTL_EVL_TTL FROM MTL_EVL T WHERE T.ASMT_MTL_EVL_RSLT_ID NOT IN(SELECT ASMT_MTL_EVL_RSLT_ID FROM TB_LMS_MUT_EVAL_RLTN) AND T.DELYN = 'N' AND T.USEYN = 'Y' AND T.ADM_REGYN = 'Y' UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT A.ASMT_MTL_EVL_RSLT_ID , A.MTL_EVL_TYCD , A.MTL_EVL_TTL FROM MTL_EVL A JOIN TB_LMS_MUT_EVAL_RLTN B ON A.ASMT_MTL_EVL_RSLT_ID = B.ASMT_MTL_EVL_RSLT_ID WHERE RGTR_ID = #{userId} AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.ADM_REGYN = 'N'

/* SQL ID : MutEvalDAO.listMutEvalByCrsCreCd 설 명 : 평가 정보 강의 연결 조회 */ SELECT A.ASMT_MTL_EVL_RSLT_ID AS evalCd , A.MTL_EVL_TYCD AS evalTypeCd , A.MTL_EVL_TTL AS evalTitle FROM MTL_EVL AS A JOIN TB_LMS_MUT_EVAL_RLTN AS B ON A.ASMT_MTL_EVL_RSLT_ID = B.ASMT_MTL_EVL_RSLT_ID AND B.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd}
mapper.insert:
/* SQL ID : MutEvalDAO.insertMutEval 설 명 : 평가 정보 등록 */
MERGE INTO MTL_EVL A USING ( SELECT #{evalCd} AS ASMT_MTL_EVL_RSLT_ID , 'R' AS MTL_EVL_TYCD , #{evalTitle} AS MTL_EVL_TTL , 'N' AS DELYN , 'Y' AS USEYN , #{adminYn} AS ADM_REGYN , #{userId} AS RGTR_ID , FN_DTTM() AS FRST_INQ_DTTM FROM DUAL ) TEMP ON (A.ASMT_MTL_EVL_RSLT_ID = TEMP.ASMT_MTL_EVL_RSLT_ID) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET A.MTL_EVL_TTL = TEMP.MTL_EVL_TTL WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( ASMT_MTL_EVL_RSLT_ID , MTL_EVL_TYCD , MTL_EVL_TTL , DELYN , USEYN , ADM_REGYN , RGTR_ID , FRST_INQ_DTTM ) VALUES ( TEMP.ASMT_MTL_EVL_RSLT_ID , TEMP.MTL_EVL_TYCD , TEMP.MTL_EVL_TTL , TEMP.DELYN , TEMP.USEYN , TEMP.ADM_REGYN , TEMP.RGTR_ID , TEMP.FRST_INQ_DTTM )
